scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently "npm run emulators --prefix client" "FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 GCLOUD_PROJECT=years-of-j npm run dev --prefix server" "VITE_USE_EMULATORS=true npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
